summary: Full backend + frontend testing of AccuTek Solar MVP. All 8 backend API tests pass (root, /api/company, /api/status regression, /api/leads create/validation/list with no _id leak). All 5 calculators (solar, battery, mount, generator, ROI) react correctly to input changes. Contact form validates empty submit (toast + no POST), submits successfully with valid payload (POST /api/leads verified via network capture, success panel shown). Phone links use correct tel:+18128787343. FAQ accordion and testimonial carousel work. Company endpoint returns correct data: phone (812) 878-7343, founded 1994, 10 IN + 7 IL = 17 counties.

issues: Illinois county count displays as '07 counties' with leading zero (cosmetic)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — migrate to FastAPI lifespan handlers in a future iteration.
POST /api/leads accepts any string as email with no email-format validation (only non-empty check). Consider pydantic EmailStr for stricter validation.
Missing required field on POST /api/leads (e.g., no 'email' key) returns 422 from pydantic rather than the documented 400. Acceptable but inconsistent with explicit 400 for empty strings.
Calculators.jsx is ~670 lines — consider splitting each calculator into its own file for maintainability (approaching the 700-line soft limit).
CORS allow_origins uses '*' with allow_credentials=True — browsers will reject credentialed requests. Tighten in production.
seed_data_creation: Created a few TEST_-prefixed leads and status-check records in MongoDB via API during tests (non-destructive, easy to filter/clean by prefix).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and covers /api/, /api/company, /api/status (regression), /api/leads (create valid, create invalid missing name, missing email string, missing email field, list sorted + no _id leak). Run via: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. All interactive elements have data-testid. Contact form success is captured via network interception on POST /api/leads. Mount recommender threshold: default state returns Roof Mount; setting roof age=20+ + shade=heavy flips to Ground Mount.
rca of the issue: No issues — implementation matches review request end-to-end.
